Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.InternalServerError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
Texts.CUInventory:Catalog:002: A product with SKU '{Sku}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:001: A supplier with email '{Email}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:002: A supplier with phone number '{PhoneNumber}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:003: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft order.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:005: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' is {Status}; this action requires a confirmed order.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:006: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' has no line for product '{ProductId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:007: Receiving {Requested} of product '{ProductId}' exceeds the outstanding quantity of {Outstanding} on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:008: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' is {Status} and cannot be cancelled.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:009: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' has more than one line for product '{ProductId}'; combine them into a single line.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:001: A warehouse with code '{Code}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:002: Shipment '{ShipmentId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft shipment.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:004: Shipment '{ShipmentId}' is {Status}; this action requires a dispatched shipment.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:005: The shipment supplier does not match the supplier on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:006: The shipment destination warehouse does not match the warehouse on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:007: Shipping {Requested} of product '{ProductId}' exceeds the outstanding quantity of {Outstanding} on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:001: Insufficient stock for product '{ProductId}': {Requested} was requested but only {Available} is available.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:002: Balance '{InventoryBalanceId}' has only {Reserved} reserved; {Requested} was requested.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:003: Lot '{InventoryLotId}' has only {Remaining} remaining; {Requested} was requested.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:004: No inventory balance exists for product '{ProductId}' in warehouse '{WarehouseId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:005: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft transfer.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:007: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status}; this action requires a dispatched transfer.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:008: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status} and cannot be cancelled.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:009: A stock transfer cannot use the same warehouse '{WarehouseId}' as both source and destination.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:010: Restoring {Requested} to lot '{InventoryLotId}' would exceed its original quantity of {Original} (currently {Remaining} remaining).
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:011: Lot '{InventoryLotId}' has only {Available} available; {Requested} was requested for reservation.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:012: Lot '{InventoryLotId}' has only {Reserved} reserved; {Requested} was requested.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:013: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status} and cannot be deleted; only draft or cancelled transfers can be deleted.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:014: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' has more than one line for product '{ProductId}'; combine them into a single line.
Texts.CUInventory:Sales:001: Sale '{SaleId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft sale.
Texts.CUInventory:Sales:003: Sale '{SaleId}' is {Status} and cannot be deleted; only draft or cancelled sales can be deleted.
Texts.CUInventory:Sales:004: Allocation '{SaleAllocationId}' of sale '{SaleId}' has no inventory lot; cancel the sale and recreate it.
